purpose: Craft examples for court rank pressure, edict-driven reversals, hidden intentions, and public/private power play inside palace politics.
source_priority_rules: Source text and locked payload outrank this example pack.
Use examples only to shape rank pressure, ceremony, accusation, and withheld intent.
Do not invent imperial orders, bloodline facts, poison, or secret alliances unless the source supports them.
genre_boundary: Track who has public rank, who has private leverage, and what the room is allowed to hear.
Make the turn visible through ritual, seating, edict, accusation, or a controlled breach of protocol.
Do not treat palace strategy like a modern office confrontation.

scene_card_examples.visual: In the locked hall, a source-grounded order or ritual cue changes who may speak and who must kneel.
scene_card_examples.voiceover: The shift is political because the room sees it before the people involved can deny it.

asset_goal.purpose: rank geography, edict cue, public witness

script_scene_examples.visual: One controlled line, gesture, or decree forces a public change in rank pressure without yet exposing the full private plan.
script_scene_examples.voiceover: Court strategy works because the public move and the hidden motive are not the same thing.
script_scene_examples.action_result: Public rank pressure shifts and the hidden agenda gains or loses leverage.

dialogue_style_examples: Use concise court language tied to rank, accusation, mercy, or protocol.
Let the room's witness status matter in every reversal.

negative_examples.bad: Add a secret edict or poison twist that the source never set up.
negative_examples.why_bad: It breaks fairness and collapses the political logic.

forbidden_drift: Do not swap lead character identity, rank role, or speaker authority without source support.
Do not introduce a new decree, seal, poison, heirloom, or weapon unless the source seeds it.
Do not change hall, corridor, gate, throne line, or blocking position without a visible causal bridge.
Do not alter relationship status, knowledge state, or alliance state without source support.
Do not change cause and effect so the political reversal appears unsupported.

image: Lock rank geography, line of sight, decree or seal anchor, and the posture difference between public power and private fear.
video: Preserve continuity between protocol, accusation, and the new public state created by the reversal.
